hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Vietnam Phuot Real Home in Kon Tum offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and garden views. Each room includes a work desk, electric kettle, and free WiFi.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden. The property features a lounge, outdoor seating area, and a coffee shop. Free on-site private parking is available.
Dining Experience: The homestay provides a child-friendly buffet and breakfast in the room. Menus cater to special diets, and room service is available.
Local Attractions: Located 41 km from Pleiku Airport, the homestay is near Bishop's House of Kontum (5 km) and Pleiku Stadium (44 km). Cycling activities are popular.
